heading: I manage the content, so you can manage the business.
paragraphs: For years, I've run content brands from zero, managing every digital asset, deadline, and edit myself. I've delivered commissioned edits for U.S.-based artists reaching millions of views natively, proving I can read a global algorithm, not just a local one.

I also run successful paid social campaigns, handling creatives and targeting that actually convert. I work in Premiere Pro and After Effects daily, and use AI tools to speed up planning and research without cutting corners on quality.

I don't just edit videos—I build the operations behind them so they actually get seen. Open to remote work for video editing, paid social, and content operations across US, UK, AU, and Asia time zones.
